name: Plum-Sauced Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken in a large bowl; mix until blended.
2. Add chicken pieces, turning to coat.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Place chicken pieces on a rack in a foil-lined shallow roasting pan.
5. Bake in preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes, basting chicken with plum jelly mixture occasionally; turn once.
6. Increase oven temperature to 450°F; bake chicken, basting with sauce twice, until well glazed, about 15 minutes.
7. Remove drippings from pan; skim off fat.
8. Serve drippings hot as a sauce with the chicken.
NOTE: Serve with hot cooked rice and cooked snow peas.
